title: ValidatedResultContract
description: Schema of the Validated Result Contract generated by the Runtime and consumed by the Bootstrap.

x-contract-metadata.semantics: Sinal de saída estruturado emitido pelo Runtime para o Bootstrap, contendo o veredito da tarefa e o caminho do diff gerado.
x-contract-metadata.lifecycle: Escrito no final do pipeline da tarefa; consumido pelo Bootstrap para decidir a promoção (Git) e apagado na limpeza.

status.description: Validation status of the entire cognitive execution boundary pipeline. MUST be 'accepted' only if all validation checks and constraints pass, authorizing persistence.

candidate_diff_path.description: Physical path where the validated diff is materialized by the Runtime.
